name: @prune/ci-validator
description: F6 — CI-outcome fix-context validator. Uses red->green test transitions as ground truth for WHICH context atoms actually fix a failure class: per (failureClass, atom) it tracks how often the atom was present on a fix vs a non-fix, and ranks candidate context for a NEW failure of that class by its fix-association. The CI transition is caller-fed (external build outcome); the estimator is a pure Beta-Binomial counter; inert (null) with no CI signal. No model call, no regex.
